allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\paula\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Python*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files\\Python*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\paula\\miniconda3'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\paula\\anaconda3'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Prog\\SnowCLI\\snow.exe'' sql -q ""SELECT MIN\(AS_OF_DATE\), MAX\(AS_OF_DATE\), COUNT\(DISTINCT AS_OF_DATE\) AS date_count, COUNT\(DISTINCT COMPOSITE_TICKER\) AS etf_count, COUNT\(DISTINCT CONSTITUENT_TICKER\) AS stock_count, COUNT\(*\) AS total_rows FROM ETF_DB.LOCAL_COPY.CONSTITUENTS;"" --connection myfirstsnow")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Prog\\SnowCLI\\snow.exe'' sql -q ""SELECT MIN\(AS_OF_DATE\), MAX\(AS_OF_DATE\), COUNT\(DISTINCT AS_OF_DATE\) AS date_count, COUNT\(DISTINCT COMPOSITE_TICKER\) AS etf_count, COUNT\(*\) AS total_rows FROM ETF_DB.LOCAL_COPY.INDUSTRY;"" --connection myfirstsnow")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Prog\\SnowCLI\\snow.exe'' sql -q ""SELECT ASSET_CLASS, COUNT\(DISTINCT COMPOSITE_TICKER\) AS etf_count FROM ETF_DB.LOCAL_COPY.INDUSTRY GROUP BY ASSET_CLASS ORDER BY etf_count DESC LIMIT 10;"" --connection myfirstsnow")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Prog\\SnowCLI\\snow.exe'' sql -q ""SELECT ISSUER, COUNT\(*\) AS etf_count, SUM\(AUM\) AS total_aum FROM ETF_DB.LOCAL_COPY.INDUSTRY GROUP BY ISSUER ORDER BY total_aum DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10;"" --connection myfirstsnow")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Prog\\SnowCLI\\snow.exe'' sql -q ""SELECT ASSET_CLASS, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt, AVG\(WEIGHT\) AS avg_weight, MAX\(WEIGHT\) AS max_weight FROM ETF_DB.LOCAL_COPY.CONSTITUENTS WHERE AS_OF_DATE = ''2025-04-02'' GROUP BY ASSET_CLASS ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15;"" --connection myfirstsnow")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Prog\\SnowCLI\\snow.exe'' sql -q ""SELECT as_of_date, COUNT\(DISTINCT composite_ticker\) AS etf_count, COUNT\(*\) AS rows FROM ETF_DB.LOCAL_COPY.CONSTITUENTS GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;"" --connection myfirstsnow")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Prog\\SnowCLI\\snow.exe'' sql -q ""SELECT as_of_date, COUNT\(DISTINCT composite_ticker\) AS etf_count, COUNT\(*\) AS total_rows FROM ETF_DB.LOCAL_COPY.CONSTITUENTS GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;"" --connection myfirstsnow")
